---
title: "Publications and Citation"
description: "Physics references used by the OPALX manual and initial citation guidance."
audience: physics
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
nocite: '@*'
---

The bibliography below is curated from the integrated OPALX physics chapters.
A release-specific software citation and DOI will be added when the redesigned
documentation is published as the canonical manual.

When reporting results today, record the exact OPALX revision and cite both the
software repository and the publications associated with the physical model
being used.

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
